message:
fix(ci): remove unsupported --workspace from llvm-cov report

The --workspace flag is not supported for the cargo llvm-cov report
subcommand. The report command already uses instrumented data from
the previous workspace-scoped coverage run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Generate coverage summary (JSON)
         run: |
           # Generate JSON coverage report (reuses instrumented data from previous step)
-          cargo llvm-cov report --workspace \
+          cargo llvm-cov report \
             --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|benches/)" \
             --json \
             --output-path coverage.json
